subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Taqi! Hearken unto the Voice of Him Who was wronged. Verily, He maketh mention of thee through His grace, remembereth thee through His signs, and illumineth thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل تقی اسمع ندآء المظلوم انه یذکرک بفضله و یذکرک بایاته و ینورک
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @prayer for nearness to God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power of prayer, @praise and encouragement
